mechanism_narrative: A persistent decline in the federal funds rate reduces the risk-free discount rate, directly boosting equity valuations over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate rises above 4.5% within a single month, it signals a labor market cooling that historically precedes Fed rate cuts, driving positive equity returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are negative or flat in more than 50% of instances where UNRATE crosses 4.5, or predictive t-statistic falls below 1.96 over a 5-year out-of-sample test.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous contraction in industrial production and a surge in new housing starts indicates a sectoral reallocation from manufacturing to residential construction, which historically supports corporate earnings and yields positive S&P 500 returns over 60 days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to produce positive 60d forward returns in more than 60% of occurrences, or the interaction term coefficient in a multivariate regression is statistically indistinguishable from zero.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of aggressive rate hikes, a sharp deceleration in core inflation reduces the probability of further tightening, compressing equity risk premiums and generating positive forward returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: In tightening cycles, CPI deceleration periods produce negative or zero 20d forward returns in more than 50% of cases, or the conditional Sharpe ratio is not significantly positive.

mechanism_narrative: When real personal savings fall below 600 billion, consumer spending capacity is constrained, leading to lower corporate revenue growth and negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are positive in more than 50% of triggered instances, or the signal's directional accuracy drops below 55% over a 5-year out-of-sample test.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate combined with declining industrial production signals a broad-based economic slowdown that increases recession fears, driving negative equity returns over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict negative 60d returns in more than 60% of historical instances, or the interaction effect vanishes when controlling for FEDFUNDS changes.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in the industrial production index reflects expanding capacity utilization and healthy corporate throughput, which directly supports earnings expectations and yields positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rolling 3-year Rank IC remains below 0.02, or 20-day forward returns in INDPRO expansion phases are not statistically higher than contraction phases (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: When new housing starts exceed 1.5 million annualized units, it signals strong builder confidence and robust aggregate demand, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are negative in more than 50% of instances where HOUST crosses 1500, or the signal's information ratio falls below 0.5 over a 10-year backtest.
